title: AAG Bootstrap Output v1
description: aag bootstrap の output envelope (= AI session 開始時の aggregate snapshot)。多 hop discovery (= where-am-i → context → ...) を 1 command で articulate するための substrate。
$comment: v4.2 cluster C C1 で institute (= reposteward-substrate-v4-2-cluster-c)。canonical Go implementation: aag-engine/internal/bootstrap/bootstrap.go。既存 commands の output を aggregate (= read-only composition、新 logic 不在)。

whereAmI.description: where-am-i output (= where-am-i-v2 schema 準拠)

context.description: context output (= context-project-v1 schema 準拠、active project ある場合のみ articulate、不在は null)

command.description: 推奨 command line (= 例: 'aag obligation check --base main --head HEAD')

rationale.description: 推奨 rationale (= heuristic、AI 判断材料、必須 follow ではない)

suggestedNext.description: AI session 向け heuristic next command 候補 (= confidence: heuristic)

provenance.description: 出典 metadata (= confidence: inferred、aggregate of substrate snapshots)
